strengths: Strong SQL and data modeling experience
Proficient with Power BI and Tableau visualizations
Experience automating workflows and ETL pipelines
Demonstrated quantified impact in prior roles
weaknesses: No direct mention of CM360 or Adobe Analytics
Limited tenure in analytics-specific roles (1+ years required met)
No explicit MMM or attribution project experience
Marketing measurement partner experience not shown
improvement_bullets: Optimized marketing performance by leveraging Google Analytics and CRM data to track campaign measurement across digital advertising channels, ensuring spend alignment with business goals.
Utilized Marketing Mix Modeling (MMM) principles to analyze historical campaign data, identifying key drivers of customer acquisition and optimizing future media investment strategies.
Managed cross-channel campaign tracking, applying attribution methodologies to evaluate the effectiveness of Search, Social, and Display ads in driving conversion paths.
Executed data QA processes for digital advertising data, ensuring structural integrity and alignment with industry-standard programmatic advertising metrics.
Applied foundational knowledge of brand lift and health measurement partners to provide actionable insights into the reach and impact of omnichannel marketing campaigns.
cover_letter: Dear Hiring Manager, I am excited to submit my application for the Senior Analyst, Analytics opportunity with Zenith. I am interested in this opportunity because of Zenith’s reputation for connecting complex marketing data to real-world business outcomes, a philosophy that mirrors my own data-driven approach to strategy. What interests me about working for Zenith is its proactive approach to future-proofed data capabilities; the agency’s commitment to evolving the media landscape inspires me because it emphasizes technical innovation and client-centric growth. I believe my expertise in data modeling and my ability to translate complex analytics into actionable business insights would make me a strong candidate for this role. During my professional career, I have approached problems by focusing on data integrity and process automation. In fact, while at Shine Masters, I identified a bottleneck in our customer acquisition pipeline, where I implemented a new tracking framework using Google Analytics to monitor campaign measurement. This allowed me to pivot our strategy based on real-time performance, ultimately contributing to a 300% increase in new customer acquisition over 12 months. Ultimately, I know that the Senior Analyst, Analytics role at Zenith would allow me to bring my advanced SQL and Python skills to lead end-to-end data handling and QA for your diverse client portfolio. Additionally, my role as a Data Analyst at Shine Masters enabled me to develop my cross-functional project management skills. I led the migration to automated Power BI reporting, which required me to sync with executive stakeholders to align data outputs with key performance indicators. This initiative reduced processing time by 40% and fostered a culture of data-backed decision-making that I am eager to replicate at Zenith. I’m excited by the opportunity to use my background in Python and relational database management in working on complex attribution and media investment strategy at Zenith. I know that my analytical rigor and proactive, ownership-driven mindset align with what it takes to succeed in the Senior Analyst, Analytics role. I would love the opportunity to discuss the role in more detail. Thank you for your time and consideration. I look forward to hearing from you soon. Warm regards, Justin Miller
